zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne de Handling於1433年出生在英國越可爾博爾頓 卡素 姆 雷德米爾時，她的父親Sir Robert Harling45歲，母親Lady Jane Gonville43歲。她於1452年與Sir Robert Wingfield III在英國英格蘭素福爾可列黑林加姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1498年9月18日享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾福爾可易亞斯特 哈林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne de Handling于1433年出生在英国越可爾博爾頓 卡素 姆 雷德米爾时，她的父亲Sir Robert Harling45岁，母亲Lady Jane Gonville43岁。她于1452年与Sir Robert Wingfield III在英国英格兰素福爾可列黑林加姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1498年9月18日享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾福爾可易亞斯特 哈林。

nameMeanings.name: Handling
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps an altered form of German   Wendling  .

variants.name: Wendling
meanings: habitational name from any of numerous places called Wendling, notably in Bavaria, or a place called Wendlingen, for example near Stuttgart.
(Westphalia): patronymic from the personal name Wendel (see Wendel 1).

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne de Handling was born in 1433, in Bolton Castle cum Redmire, Yorkshire, England, her father, Sir Robert Harling, was 45 and her mother, Lady Jane Gonville, was 43. She married Sir Robert Wingfield III in 1452, in Letheringham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 18 September 1498, at the age of 65, and was buried in East Harling, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Bolton Castle cum Redmire, Yorkshire, En: Bolton Castle cum Redmire, Everwyck, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne de Handling est née en 1433, à Bolton Castle cum Redmire, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Harling, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Lady Jane Gonville, avait 43 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Wingfield III en 1452, à Letheringham, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 18 septembre 1498, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à East Harling, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne de Handling 1433 in Bolton Castle cum Redmire, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Harling 45 und ihre Mutter Lady Jane Gonville 43. Sie hat 1452 in Letheringham, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Sir Robert Wingfield III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 18. September 1498 im Alter von 65 Jahren und wurde in East Harling, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne de Handling è nata il nel 1433 nel Bolton Castle cum Redmire, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Sir Robert Harling, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Lady Jane Gonville, aveva 43 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Wingfield III nel 1452, nel Letheringham, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 18 settembre 1498, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a East Harling, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne de Handlingが1433年にイギリスヨークシュアイアボルトン カストル クウム レドミーアで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Harlingは45歳，母Lady Jane Gonvilleは43歳であった。1452年にイギリスイギリススフォルクレスエリンガムでSir Robert Wingfield IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1498年9月18日に65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーフォルクエアスト ハーリングにて埋葬された。

ko.Bolton Castle cum Redmire, Yorkshire, En: 영국 요르크실르 볼턴 카스틀 c 레드미어
ko.lifeSummary: Anne de Handling(이)가 1433년 영국 요르크실르 볼턴 카스틀 c 레드미어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Harling(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Jane Gonville(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 1452년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 레더잉함에서 Sir Robert Wingfield III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1498년 9월 18일 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 이스트 하를링에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne de Handling nasceu em 1433, em Bolton Castle cum Redmire, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Harling, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Lady Jane Gonville, tinha 43 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Wingfield III em 1452, em Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 18 de setembro de 1498, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em East Harling, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Bolton Castle cum Redmire, Yorkshire, En: болтон кастл кум редмир, еркшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne de Handling родилась в 1433 г. в местности болтон кастл кум редмир, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Harling было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Jane Gonville, 43. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Wingfield III в 1452 г. в местности летирингхам, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 18 сентября 1498 г. в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности эаст харлинг, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sir Robert Wingfield III en 1452, en Letheringham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 18 de septiembre de 1498, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en East Harling, Norfolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
